name: Auto-Discover Contacts & Outreach Kit for /t/{domain}
description: Transform the URL campaign creator into a killer sales tool: auto-discover 3-5 decision makers at the target company via AI Ark + Apollo, generate per-contact personalized outreach with LinkedIn activity references, provide one-click outreach actions per contact, and push everything to an Instantly campaign.

stories.title: discover-contacts edge function — AI Ark people search + Apollo enrichment
acceptance: New edge function `discover-contacts` accepts { domain, icp_titles?: string[], max_contacts?: number }
Calls AI Ark POST /v1/people with account.domain.any.include[domain] + contact.title filters
Falls back to Apollo POST /api/v1/mixed_people/api_search with q_organization_domains + person_titles
Merges results: AI Ark primary, Apollo fills gaps (photo_url, linkedin_url)
Returns { success, contacts: DiscoveredContact[] } with 3-5 contacts sorted by seniority
stories.notes: AI Ark people search: X-TOKEN auth, POST /v1/people, body { page: 0, size: 5, account: { domain: { any: { include: [domain] } } }, contact: { title: { any: { include: icp_titles, searchMode: 'SMART' } } } }. Apollo: x-api-key auth, POST /api/v1/mixed_people/api_search. Use Promise.allSettled for resilience. AI Ark costs 12.5 credits/call, Apollo 0.3/search. ICP titles default to company.icp.title from research data.

stories.title: DiscoveredContact type + ContactCard component shell
acceptance: DiscoveredContact interface in demo-types.ts: first_name, last_name, full_name, title, seniority, department, linkedin_url, photo_url, email, company_name, recent_posts?: string[]
ContactCard component renders: photo, name, title, seniority badge, LinkedIn link
ContactCard has expandable state for outreach draft + action buttons (collapsed by default)
Skeleton loading state for when contacts are being discovered
stories.notes: ContactCard should be a self-contained component. Photo from AI Ark profile.picture.source or Apollo photo_url. LinkedIn from AI Ark link.linkedin or Apollo linkedin_url. Seniority badge colored by level (VP/C-Suite = violet, Director = blue, Manager = emerald).

stories.title: Wire discover-contacts into CreatorView — contact discovery panel
acceptance: After research completes, auto-fires discover-contacts with domain + research.company.icp.title
New 'Decision Makers' section in right column shows ContactCard for each discovered contact
Loading skeleton while contacts are being discovered
Graceful empty state if no contacts found (suggest manual search)
Contact count badge on section header
stories.notes: Call discover-contacts with session.access_token. Fire after research completes (useEffect on research). Store contacts in useState<DiscoveredContact[]>. Place the Decision Makers panel above the ICP card in the right column for prominence.

stories.title: Per-contact AI outreach drafts via campaign-outreach-draft
acceptance: Clicking a ContactCard expands it to show a personalized outreach draft
Draft is generated via existing campaign-outreach-draft edge function with contact-specific prospect data
Each contact gets a DIFFERENT angle: references their title, department, and seniority for unique messaging
Draft is editable inline within the ContactCard
Drafts are cached per-contact (don't re-fetch on collapse/expand)
stories.notes: Reuse existing campaign-outreach-draft endpoint — just pass different prospect data for each contact. The edge function already accepts prospect.title, prospect.first_name etc. and personalizes based on that. No backend changes needed. Cache in a useRef map keyed by contact email/linkedin.

stories.title: One-click outreach kit per contact — copy email, LinkedIn, mailto
acceptance: Each expanded ContactCard shows action buttons: Copy Draft, Open LinkedIn, Send Email (mailto:)
Copy Draft copies the full outreach text to clipboard with [LINK] replaced by campaign link (if created)
Open LinkedIn opens their linkedin_url in new tab
Send Email opens mailto: link with pre-filled subject + body from the draft
Copy Demo Link copies the /t/{code} link for this specific contact (if link created)
Toast feedback on copy actions
stories.notes: mailto: link needs encodeURIComponent for subject and body. LinkedIn button disabled if no linkedin_url. Copy actions use navigator.clipboard.writeText. Show checkmark icon after copy for 2s.

stories.title: Push to Instantly campaign — all contacts + sequences in one click
acceptance: New 'Push to Instantly' button appears when contacts are discovered and have email addresses
Calls new push-to-instantly-campaign edge function that creates campaign + pushes leads
Each contact becomes a lead with first_name, last_name, email, company_name, custom_variables (title, linkedin_url, demo_link)
Campaign name defaults to '{company_name} — Outreach {date}'
Uses InstantlyClient from _shared/instantly.ts
Resolves API key from instantly_org_credentials table (requires org membership)
Success state shows campaign name + lead count with link to Instantly dashboard
stories.notes: New edge function push-campaign-instantly because instantly-push is tightly coupled to ops table rows. This one accepts raw leads array. Use POST /api/v1/campaign/add for new campaign, POST /api/v1/lead/add to push leads. Copy InstantlyClient usage from instantly-push. Campaign schedule defaults to Mon-Fri 9-5 America/Chicago. Needs JWT auth to resolve org + API key.

stories.title: LinkedIn activity enrichment via EXA search per contact
acceptance: After contacts are discovered, fire EXA search per contact: '{full_name} {company_name} linkedin' for recent posts/activity
Add recent_posts field to each DiscoveredContact with top 2-3 activity snippets
ContactCard shows 'Recent Activity' section with post snippets when available
Outreach drafts reference recent activity when available (pass to campaign-outreach-draft as prospect_intel.recent_activity)
EXA calls are parallel (Promise.allSettled) with 5s timeout per contact
Activity enrichment is progressive — contacts render immediately, activity populates async
stories.notes: Add EXA search as a secondary enrichment pass in discover-contacts. Use EXA neural search: { query: '{name} {company} linkedin', numResults: 3, contents: { text: true, highlights: true }, useAutoprompt: true, startPublishedDate: 3 months ago }. Extract post titles/snippets. This is the 'LinkedIn scraping' feature — EXA indexes LinkedIn public posts. Much more reliable and legal than Apify LinkedIn scraping.

execution.parallelOpportunities: CC-001 + CC-002 can run in parallel (backend + frontend type scaffolding)

mvp.delivers: Auto-discovered contacts with LinkedIn links and one-click outreach actions

dependencyGraph: CC-001 (backend) + CC-002 (types+component) --> CC-003 (wire into CreatorView) --> CC-004 (per-contact drafts) --> CC-005 (outreach kit) --> CC-006 (Instantly push) --> CC-007 (LinkedIn activity)

risks.issue: AI Ark people search costs 12.5 credits per call
risks.mitigation: Single call per domain visit, cache results. Apollo as fallback is 0.3 credits.

risks.issue: Instantly push requires org-level API key from instantly_org_credentials
risks.mitigation: Graceful degradation — hide Push to Instantly button if no API key configured for user's org

risks.issue: AI Ark may return contacts without email addresses
risks.mitigation: Apollo match as fallback for email. Hide mailto/Instantly push for contacts without email.

risks.issue: EXA may not find LinkedIn posts for all contacts
risks.mitigation: Progressive enhancement — activity section only shown when data available

aiArkPeopleSearch.body: { page: 0, size: 5, account: { domain: { any: { include: [domain] } } }, contact: { title: { any: { include: titles, searchMode: 'SMART' } } } }
aiArkPeopleSearch.response: { content: [{ profile: { first_name, last_name, title, picture: { source } }, department: { seniority }, link: { linkedin }, location: { default } }] }

apolloPeopleSearch.response: { people: [{ first_name, last_name, title, seniority, photo_url, linkedin_url, email, organization: { name } }] }

instantlyCampaignCreate.body: { name, campaign_schedule: { schedules: [{ name: 'Default', timing: { from: '09:00', to: '17:00' }, days: { 1: true, 2: true, 3: true, 4: true, 5: true }, timezone: 'America/Chicago' }] } }

instantlyLeadPush.body: { campaign_id, leads: [{ email, first_name, last_name, company_name, custom_variables: { title, linkedin_url, demo_link } }] }

exaPersonActivity.body: { query: '{name} {company} linkedin', numResults: 3, contents: { text: true, highlights: true }, useAutoprompt: true, type: 'neural', startPublishedDate: '3 months ago' }
